# ProfileSession

> Profiling session data from @platformatic/flame

## Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| id | uuid | yes | auto | Primary key |
| name | string | yes | - | Session name |
| profileType | cpu \| heap \| both | yes | - | Type of profiling |
| status | running \| completed \| failed | yes | running | Session status |
| pid | integer | yes | - | Process ID being profiled |
| durationMs | integer | yes | - | Profiling duration |
| flameGraphPath | string | yes | - | Path to generated flamegraph SVG |
| cpuProfilePath | string | yes | - | Path to raw CPU profile JSON |
| heapSnapshotPath | string | yes | - | Path to heap snapshot |
| hotspotCount | integer | yes | 0 | Number of hotspots detected |
| peakHeapMb | float | yes | - | Peak heap usage in MB |
| summary | json | yes | - | Summary statistics |
| createdAt | datetime | yes | auto | Creation timestamp |
| updatedAt | datetime | yes | auto | Last update timestamp |

## Relations

- hasMany **PerformancePattern** (via `profileSessionId`)

## API Endpoints

- `GET /api/profile-session` — List all
- `POST /api/profile-session` — Create
- `GET /api/profile-session/:id` — Get by ID
- `PUT /api/profile-session/:id` — Update
- `DELETE /api/profile-session/:id` — Delete
